input_dict.question: Where are the studios, where the Muppet Shows were recorded, located ?
input_dict.source_summary: They are at Elstree/Borehamwood in Hertfordshire, England (the Elstree Studios film and TV facilities).
input_dict.target_summary: First-hop context identifies the studios as "Elstree Studios" in England. The second-hop supporting sentence confirms a specific Elstree facility: "BBC Elstree Centre, sometimes referred to as BBC Elstree Studios, is a television production facility located on Clarendon Road in Borehamwood, Hertfordshire." Integrate: the studios referred to as Elstree Studios (including BBC Elstree Centre) are located in Borehamwood, Hertfordshire, England (BBC Elstree Centre on Clarendon Road).
input_dict.candidate_summary: First-hop context identifies the studios as "Elstree Studios" in England. The second-hop supporting sentence confirms a specific Elstree facility: "BBC Elstree Centre, sometimes referred to as BBC Elstree Studios, is a television production facility located on Clarendon Road in Borehamwood, Hertfordshire." Integrate: the studios referred to as Elstree Studios (including BBC Elstree Centre) are located in Borehamwood, Hertfordshire, England (BBC Elstree Centre on Clarendon Road).
